title: Savory Velvety British Avocado Toast
description: A nostalgic British snack that marries creamy avocado with perfectly toasted bread, seasoned for a velvety, savory bite.

ingredients.name: avocado (Hass)
ingredients.notes: cut in half, pit removed, flesh scooped

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat and brush one side of each bread slice with olive oil.
Toast the bread until golden brown on both sides, about 1-2 minutes per side; remove and set aside.
In a bowl, scoop the avocado flesh and mash it with a fork until smooth yet slightly chunky for a velvety texture.
Add the lemon juice, sea salt, black pepper, red pepper flakes, and smoked paprika to the avocado and mash together until well combined.
Fold in the chopped chives and nutritional yeast (if using).
Spread the avocado mixture evenly onto each toasted slice using a spatula or spoon.
Garnish with a sprinkle of remaining chives and, if desired, a light drizzle of olive oil for shine.
Serve immediately at room temperature, optionally accompanied by sliced cucumber or a small bowl of tomato soup for a classic British pairing.
